title: Communication Content Contract — Design
summary: Defines one canonical content-body payload contract for conversational-content emitters (say/pose/ooc/emit/page/whisper/pemit), enforced symmetrically for Lua and binary plugins at a single host chokepoint, collapsing divergent per-consumer dialects.
scope: conversational content verbs (say, pose, ooc, emit, page, whisper, pemit)
